methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series B → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.9x) to $58M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 6 same-sector + same/adjacent-stage peers in Chips & Semiconductors. Range: $500M - $5.0B.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Semiconductors P/S median is 20.6x across 3 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

private.name: Positron AI
private.rationale: Same sector (Chips & Semiconductors), same stage (Series B), post-money $1B+

data.narrative:
Sagence is a Series B semiconductor company that has raised $58M to date. The valuation analysis draws on a universe of eight private peers in chips and semiconductors at comparable or adjacent stages, plus three public semiconductor benchmarks (ALAB, NVDA, AMD).

Two methods triangulate to a defensible range. Stage-progression analysis applies a 1.9x step-up multiplier typical of Series B advancement, implying $110M. Peer-median analysis across six same-sector, same/adjacent-stage companies yields a $1.0B median valuation, with a range of $500M to $5.0B. The peer set includes Etched ($5.0B, Series A), d-Matrix ($2.0B, Series A), Positron AI ($1.0B, Series B), Substrate ($1.0B, Series A), and DEEPX ($529M, Series C). Public-comp anchoring via price-to-sales multiples (20.6x median across the three tickers) cannot be applied due to absence of revenue disclosure, typical for private companies at this stage.

The triangulated range spans $94M (low) to $1.1B (high), with a median of $555M. This wide spread reflects two competing signals: the stage-progression method grounds near the lower bound, while the peer-median—heavily influenced by contemporaneous funding multiples in a heated frontier-chip market—anchors the upper half. Key uncertainties include revenue traction, IP defensibility, and duration to next financing event, all of which materially narrow this range upon disclosure.
